name: markAI
description: markAI is an AI-powered marketing platform from Techbridge University College that helps non-marketers do marketing. It turns a short brief into a marketing strategy and generates on-brand content, taking a campaign from strategy through to finished copy without needing a marketing background.
features: Turns a short brief into a structured marketing strategy
Generates on-brand marketing content and copy from that strategy
Takes a campaign from strategy through to finished content in one place
Written for non-marketers, so no marketing background is required
audience: Non-marketers, small-business owners, entrepreneurs, educators, and students who need to produce marketing without a marketing team

faqs.a: markAI is an AI-powered marketing platform from Techbridge University College. It helps people without a marketing background turn a brief into a marketing strategy and then generate on-brand content and copy.
Non-marketers: small-business owners, entrepreneurs, educators, and students who need marketing strategy and content but do not have a dedicated marketing team.
A marketing strategy from your brief, and on-brand marketing content and copy generated from that strategy, so a campaign can go from idea to finished content in one place.

faqs.q: Do I need marketing experience to use it?
faqs.a: No. markAI is designed for non-marketers and guides you from strategy to content without assuming any marketing background.
